title: Braised Lamb Shanks
description: A hearty, comforting dish featuring tender lamb shanks in a rich, flavorful sauce.
instructions: 2. Season the lamb shanks with salt and pepper.
3. Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
4. Sear the lamb shanks until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes per side.
5. Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
6. Add the onions to the pot and cook until they're dark and caramelized, about 20 minutes.
7. Add the flour to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
8. Add the red wine to the pot, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
9. Return the lamb to the pot and bring the sauce to a boil.
10. Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
11. Braise the lamb for 2 1/2 to 3 hours, or until it's tender and falls off the bone.
12. Serve the lamb with the rich, flavorful sauce spooned over the top.
